summary: Iter23 D3/D4/D5/D6 verification — 39/39 pytest GREEN across test_iter21_esp32_safety.py + test_iter22_twin_environments.py + test_iter23_d3_d6.py. Frontend HUD smoke confirms 15 ring tiles (4 inner + 5 middle + 6 outer), all 6 right-side launchers present, no demo badge. Weaver panel opens with Plans/Parts tabs and 8 category chips. NIR Scanner opens with 3 tabs; synthetic PET scan returned confidence 1.00 with 5 detected peaks and correct PET match.
action_items: Minor (naming only, NOT a bug): review_request spec referenced data-testid 'self-improve-launch-btn' but the actual button uses 'si-launch-btn' (HUDInterface.js line 398). Functionality is correct — only the testid string differs. Either update the spec or rename the testid for consistency.
critical_code_review_comments: scipy find_peaks `widths` numpy-array ambiguity already mitigated via explicit `list(widths_raw) if widths_raw is not None else []` (per agent context) — verified working in test_d4_nir_synthetic_pet_round_trip.

NIR scan endpoint first-call latency: sentence-transformer loads lazily and can take up to ~30s on cold start; subsequent calls <2s. Frontend should keep a loading state during this window (currently does).
Thermal ODE runaway detection works correctly with I_amps=25, h=5, duration=600 producing T_max≥80°C and a RUNAWAY failure. Nominal config restored automatically in test teardown.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all asserted testids found, PET match confirmed end-to-end)

seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded data (NIR library, AGRI-ROVER-01, ATLAS-CELL-V1, ATLAS-CELL-SS-V1). Synthetic NIR scan rows added by tests are non-destructive.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter23 D3-D6 fully GREEN. Backend regression suite (iter21+22+23) = 39 tests, all passing in ~30s. Frontend launcher testid for self-improve is 'si-launch-btn' (not 'self-improve-launch-btn'). NIR synthetic scan: keep ≥60s timeout for first invocation due to ST embedding model lazy load. Ring tile testids use prefix 'ring-inner-/ring-middle-/ring-outer-' (NOT 'ring-tile-').
